name: byline
description: A fresh terminal for macOS (xterm.js + node-pty)

scripts.deploy: npm run package && rm -rf /Applications/Byline.app && cp -R dist/Byline-darwin-arm64/Byline.app /Applications/ && (xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/Byline.app || true) && echo 'Installed to /Applications/Byline.app'

author: Byline
